summary: Frontend bug fix verified: Adding recipe from 'Cook with Your Stock' section now updates the calendar IMMEDIATELY without page refresh. The fix correctly passes fetchMealPlans as onMealAdded callback to PersonalizedRecipeStream. Notification sound (Web Audio API) implemented with no console errors.
passed_tests: Planner page loads with PersonalizedRecipeStream component visible
Cook with Your Stock section displays 17 recipe videos from favorite channels
Video cards show inventory match percentages (33% in Stock, 17% in Stock)
Already planned recipes show 'Planned' badge (e.g., 'Wednesday's Lunch', 'Saturday's Snacks')
Add to Plan button opens AddToPlannerModal correctly
Modal shows day selector (Tue-Mon), meal slot selector, serving size, and ingredient reservation options
Selecting Thursday + Breakfast slot updates modal submit button text to 'Add to Breakfast Plan'
Submitting the form adds recipe to meal planner via shared addMealPlan function
Success toast appears immediately: 'Recipe added to planner!' with recipe name and scheduled time
Video card in feed immediately shows 'Planned for Thu' badge (no page refresh needed)
Calendar view shows the meal in Thursday's Breakfast slot IMMEDIATELY without refresh
Meal card displays video thumbnail, title (Nashta Recipe), ingredients (Turmeric Powder, Cumin Seeds)
playSuccessSound() function executes without console errors (Web Audio API)
critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix correctly implemented: PlannerPage now passes both addMealPlan AND fetchMealPlans (as onMealAdded) to PersonalizedRecipeStream (lines 279-282)
PersonalizedRecipeStream correctly accepts onMealAdded prop (line 208) and calls it in handleModalSuccess (lines 340-343)
AddToPlannerModal correctly uses parent's addMealPlan function (line 152) ensuring shared state
playSuccessSound() implemented with Web Audio API (lines 11-42) with proper try-catch error handling
Sound plays before toast notification (line 166) for immediate user feedback
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test user and recipes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for immediate meal planner update from PersonalizedRecipeStream verified. The app has short session timeouts - login may expire between test steps. Test user recipe_tester@test.com has active household 'Test Recipe Household' with inventory items and favorite channels. New recipe 'Nashta Recipe' was added to Thursday's Breakfast during testing.

bug_verification.original_issue: When adding recipe from 'Cook with Your Stock' section, the meal planner calendar below did not update immediately - required page refresh
bug_verification.root_cause: PersonalizedRecipeStream and PlannerPage had SEPARATE instances of useMealPlanner hook, so state wasn't shared
bug_verification.fix_applied: PlannerPage now passes addMealPlan and fetchMealPlans (as onMealAdded) props to PersonalizedRecipeStream, ensuring shared state and immediate UI refresh
bug_verification.verification_result: PASSED - Recipe added from Cook with Your Stock section now shows 'Planned' badge immediately AND appears in calendar without refresh
bug_verification.notification_sound: PASSED - playSuccessSound() using Web Audio API implemented with no console errors
